ogTitle: West Bathurst vs West Bungawalbin: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in West Bathurst and West Bungawalbin.
heading: West Bathurst vs West Bungawalbin — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between West Bathurst, New South Wales and West Bungawalbin, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: West Bathurst has a lower overall climate risk score (26/100) compared to West Bungawalbin (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is West Bathurst or West Bungawalbin safer from flooding?
faq.answer: West Bathurst has a flood risk score of 23/100, while West Bungawalbin scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: West Bathurst scores 18/100 for bushfire risk. West Bungawalbin scores 53/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in West Bathurst or West Bungawalbin?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. West Bathurst has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
